allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "E:\\Main\\seaserver\\seanime-web"; $out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; $errors = $out | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" }; if \($errors\) { $errors | Select-Object -First 20 } else { "No TypeScript errors" })
